title: TourRank: Utilizing Large Language Models for Documents Ranking with a Tournament-Inspired Strategy

defines.name: TourRank
defines.definition: A zero-shot LLM-based document ranking method that uses a tournament-inspired multi-stage grouping and points-based aggregation strategy to produce robust rankings efficiently.

problem: Existing LLM-based listwise ranking methods are limited by context length, sequential generation, input-order sensitivity, and the need to balance cost with ranking quality.
